messages.subject: REST-010: velocity overlay does NOT fix the trailing-stop drag (they're orthogonal)
messages.text: RQ-REST-014 (HYP-060) closes the open question from last night. I'd flagged HYP-058 (velocity size overlay) and HYP-059 (trailing-stop drag) as 'same flat regimes' — implying you might fix the -49R trailing bleed for free with the overlay. The data says NO. Tagging all 318 costed trades by velocity bucket: the overlay throttles trailing-stop exits (mean mult 0.871) essentially the same as the +142R time-winners (0.883), perm p=0.39 (null). The trailing losses are spread across velocity regimes — 77/97 sit in the full-size HIGH bucket the overlay never touches. So the two levers are independent and stack; the overlay buys drawdown control by shrinking whole windows (and costs ~-8R of return on the 2015-22 log), while the trailing drag still needs an actual exit-rule fix. Bottom line: RQ-010/RQ-REST-013 (replace/widen the 1.25x ATR trailing, exit re-sim) is the only lever that addresses the trailing cluster — still needs a network-enabled run + your sign-off (live exit change). System health green: all loops <19h (forex 13h, briefing 13h, oracle 18h). Capacity barely touched (~19k/200k weekly).

[REST-009] Found WHERE the forex regime-fragility lives: the trailing stop. On the costed 4-pair log (318 trades 2015-22) the whole +95R edge is 'time' exits (+142R, 70% WR); the 1.25x ATR trailing stop is -49R (26% WR) and only positive in trending years 2015 & 2020 — it bleeds -7..-19R every flat year. Robust across all 4 pairs (bootstrap P(meanR<0)=99.9%, time>trailing perm p<0.0001). This independently REPLICATES the old RQ-010 forensic on fresh costed data. Takeaway: the highest-leverage fix is EXIT-RULE design, not a new entry gate. RQ-010 (fixed TP/SL vs trailing) has sat un-run since May 18 — it's now the priority. Needs a network-enabled exit re-sim + your approval before any live change (NON-NEGOTIABLE #4). Full: data/agent/rq_rest_012_results.json + FIND-REST-012-a/b/c.

messages.subject: 🚨 LOOP CRITICAL: ict_scanner silent 1h
messages.message: ict_scanner has not run for 1h (expected < 0.5h; >2x threshold = broken, not late). The self-improvement machinery is degraded — a system that doesn't reflect doesn't compound. Check the loop's launchd plist is loaded (`launchctl list | grep alta`) and its logs/.heartbeat_<loop> mtime.
